MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-27-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER CURTIS NEAL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT HE IS RECEIVING GENERAL ASSISTANCE. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE.
